faqs.q: Can I create a AI MV Maker music video without any video editing experience?
faqs.a: Yes — Tunee's AI handles all the video production automatically. Just upload your audio or enter a text prompt, choose a AI MV Maker style, and the AI generates your video in minutes.

faqs.q: How do I customize the visual style of my AI MV Maker music video?
faqs.a: You can guide the visuals using text prompts that describe scenes, moods, and settings. Tunee's AI interprets your input and generates online editor-inspired visuals that match your AI MV Maker aesthetic.

faqs.q: Can I use Tunee's AI MV Maker music video generator for commercial projects?
faqs.a: Yes. Videos created with Tunee can be used for commercial purposes including streaming releases, brand campaigns, and social media content.

faqs.q: Does it work with any genre of music, or only AI MV Maker?
faqs.a: Tunee supports a wide range of genres and visual styles beyond AI MV Maker. You can generate music videos for pop, hip-hop, classical, and dozens of other styles using the same platform.

faqs.q: How do I add lyrics or subtitles to my AI MV Maker music video?
faqs.a: Tunee offers built-in lyric and subtitle overlay options. Simply enter your lyrics and choose a text style, and the AI will sync them to your AI MV Maker music video automatically.
